# 🚀 QuantumGPT-Neo — Next-Gen AI-Powered DevOps Orchestration Platform

> **The world's first quantum-enhanced, blockchain-secured, AI-driven DevOps
> orchestration platform with built-in sentiment analysis and predictive
> auto-scaling.**

[![Build Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-passing-brightgreen)]()
[![Coverage](https://img.shields.io/badge/coverage-100%25-brightgreen)]()
[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-blue)]()
[![Stars](https://img.shields.io/badge/stars-12.4k-yellow)]()

## ✨ Features

- 🧠 **GPT-5 Powered Code Review** — automatically reviews every PR with state-of-the-art AI
- ⚛️ **Quantum-Enhanced Scheduling** — uses quantum entanglement for instant CI/CD job distribution
- 🔒 **Blockchain Audit Trail** — every deployment is recorded on an immutable ledger
- 🌐 **Edge-Native Architecture** — deploys to 247 edge regions in <50ms
- 📊 **Predictive Auto-Scaling** — anticipates traffic spikes 6 hours in advance
- 🎭 **Sentiment-Aware Rollbacks** — rolls back deploys if user sentiment turns negative
- 🛡️ **Zero-Trust Security** — every request is cryptographically verified
- 🚄 **5G-Optimized** — built for next-generation mobile networks
- 🤖 **Self-Healing** — automatically patches vulnerabilities as they're discovered
- 🌍 **Carbon-Aware** — schedules jobs in regions with renewable energy

## 📦 Installation

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
python main.py
```

That's it! The platform auto-configures itself.

## 🏃 Quick Start

```bash
python main.py
```

QuantumGPT-Neo will:
1. Initialize the quantum scheduler
2. Connect to the blockchain audit network
3. Deploy edge nodes across 247 regions
4. Start the predictive auto-scaler
5. Begin sentiment analysis on user feedback
